Package us.crazycrew.crazycore.paper.items

Class BaseItemBuilder<Base extends BaseItemBuilder<Base>>

java.lang.Object
us.crazycrew.crazycore.paper.items.BaseItemBuilder<Base>
Type Parameters:
Base - The generic
Direct Known Subclasses:
ItemBuilder
public class BaseItemBuilder<Base extends BaseItemBuilder<Base>> extends Object
A base item builder to build everything we need.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
    protected
    BaseItemBuilder()
    An empty constructor for when you want to populate options after creation.
    protected
    BaseItemBuilder(org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack itemStack)
    A protected constructor to start off our item-stack process.

  • Constructor Details

    • BaseItemBuilder

      protected BaseItemBuilder()
      An empty constructor for when you want to populate options after creation.

    • BaseItemBuilder

      protected BaseItemBuilder(org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack itemStack)
      A protected constructor to start off our item-stack process.
      Parameters:
      itemStack - the itemstack to utilize when building

  • Method Details

    • setDisplayName

      public Base setDisplayName(net.kyori.adventure.text.Component displayName, boolean removeItalics)
      Set the display name of the item stack without italics.
      Parameters:
      displayName - the display-name
      removeItalics - whether to keep or remove italics
      Returns:
      the item builder with updated name

    • setLore

      public Base setLore(net.kyori.adventure.text.Component... lore)
      Set lore on an item.
      Parameters:
      lore - The lore to set
      Returns:
      the item builder with updated lore's

    • setLore

      public Base setLore(List<net.kyori.adventure.text.Component> lore)
      Set a list of lore to the LORE_FIELD
      Parameters:
      lore - The list to set
      Returns:
      the item builder with updated lore's

    • addLore

      public Base addLore(org.bukkit.util.Consumer<List<net.kyori.adventure.text.Component>> lore)
      Add a line to the current lore of the item.
      Parameters:
      lore - the new line you wish to add
      Returns:
      the item builder with updated lore

    • setAmount

      public Base setAmount(int amount)
      Set the amount of the item stack.
      Parameters:
      amount - the amount
      Returns:
      the item builder with updated amount

    • addEnchantment

      public Base addEnchantment(org.bukkit.enchantments.Enchantment enchantment, int level, boolean ignoreLevelRestriction)
      Adds an enchantment to the item.
      Parameters:
      enchantment - the enchantment you wish to add
      level - the level of the enchantment ( Includes unsafe levels )
      ignoreLevelRestriction - whether to ignore level restriction or not
      Returns:
      the item builder with the updated enchantment

    • removeEnchantment

      public Base removeEnchantment(org.bukkit.enchantments.Enchantment enchantment)
      Adds an enchantment to the item.
      Parameters:
      enchantment - The enchantment you wish to add
      Returns:
      the item builder with the updated enchantment

    • setEnchantments

      public Base setEnchantments(HashMap<org.bukkit.enchantments.Enchantment,Integer> enchantments, boolean ignoreLevelRestriction)
      It will override any and all enchantments used in: -> addEnchantment Method.
      Parameters:
      enchantments - the enchantments you wish to add
      ignoreLevelRestriction - whether to ignore level restrictions or not
      Returns:
      the item builder with the updated enchantments

    • addPatterns

      public Base addPatterns(List<String> patterns)
      Parameters:
      patterns - the list of Patterns to add
      Returns:
      the item builder with updated patterns

      public Base addPattern(org.bukkit.block.banner.Pattern pattern)
      Parameters:
      pattern - A pattern to add
      Returns:
      The ItemBuilder with an updated pattern

    • setPattern

      public Base setPattern(List<org.bukkit.block.banner.Pattern> patterns)
      Parameters:
      patterns - Set a list of Patterns
      Returns:
      The ItemBuilder with an updated list of patterns

      Returns:
      the list of item flags

      public Base setTexture(String texture)
      Sets the player texture/player name
      Parameters:
      texture - the texture/player name
      Returns:
      the item builder

    • setValue

      public Base setValue(String material)
      Set the type of item and its metadata in the builder.
      Parameters:
      material - the string must be in this form: %Material% or %Material%:%MetaData%
      Returns:
      the item builder with updated material

    • hideFlags

      public Base hideFlags(boolean hideFlags)
      Parameters:
      hideFlags - hide item flags based on a boolean
      Returns:
      the item builder with an updated boolean

    • setGlow

      public Base setGlow(boolean isGlowing)
      Parameters:
      isGlowing - sets whether to make an item glow or not
      Returns:
      the item builder with an updated boolean

    • setDurable

      public Base setDurable(boolean isDurable)
      Parameters:
      isDurable - whether the item is durable or not
      Returns:
      the item builder with an updated boolean

      public Base setEffect(org.bukkit.FireworkEffect... effects)
      Set an array of effects.
      Parameters:
      effects - the effects to set
      Returns:
      the item builder with updated firework effects

      public Base setEffect(List<org.bukkit.FireworkEffect> effects)

      Parameters:
      effects - the effects to add
      Returns:
      the item builder with updated firework effects
